ocr_findings.description: OCR line: 'まずは、この点をしっかりとは確認してください' — image reads 'まずは、この点をしっかりとは確認してください' — the extra 'は' appears in OCR ('しっかりとは確認') but image shows 'しっかりと確認'. Minor insertion error, low impact.

reviewer_notes: Page is part of lesson 05-06 recap covering 経営/事業/業務/システム hierarchy with bullet lists under each heading. All headings, bullet items and prose faithfully reproduced. One minor word insertion ('は') in final paragraph does not change meaning materially.
